name: feynman-technique
description: Evaluations for feynman-technique skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user wants to learn, explain simply, or verify understanding

prompts.input: 用大白话给我解释 Raft 共识算法
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '用大白话' + explain request

prompts.input: explain Kubernetes networking like I'm five
我理解对了吗？帮我验证一下我对 CRDT 的理解
用费曼方法帮我学习分布式事务
ELI5: how does gRPC differ from REST?

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for non-learning requests

prompts.input: Fix the bug in the authentication middleware
prompts.reason: Bug fix request, not a learning exercise

prompts.input: 帮我做个 MECE 分析
prompts.reason: MECE request, should trigger mece skill

prompts.input: Why does this service keep crashing? Root cause please
prompts.reason: Root cause analysis, should trigger five-whys
